title: Add Welcome Landing Page with NIRGRANTHA Branding Before Login

requirements.text: Create a full-screen welcome landing page as the very first screen users see when visiting the site. It must prominently display 'Welcome to NIRGRANTHA' as the hero heading, include the company name 'NIRGRANTHA' styled as the brand, and provide a clear call-to-action button (e.g., 'Get Started' or 'Enter Portal') that navigates the user to the role selection / login page. This page should appear before any login or role selection UI.

quotes: i want startinG welcome page witH company name NIRGRANTHA
company name startin of website sould be welcome to NIRGRANTHA
after tHat loin paes tHen according to login page it should sHow

acceptanceCriteria: The first screen displayed when the app loads is the welcome page, not the role selection or login page.
The welcome page displays the heading 'Welcome to NIRGRANTHA' prominently.
The company name 'NIRGRANTHA' is styled distinctively as a brand name.
A call-to-action button is present that, when clicked, navigates to the role selection / login page.
After clicking the CTA, the role selection login page is shown as the next step.
After a role is selected and login is completed, the appropriate role-specific dashboard is displayed as before.

requirements.text: Update the app navigation flow in App.tsx to introduce a new 'welcome' view state as the initial state (replacing 'landing' as the first shown view). The sequence must be: welcome page → role selection/login page → role-specific dashboard. Ensure the existing role-based login and dashboard logic is preserved unchanged.

quotes: after tHat loin paes tHen according to login page it should sHow

acceptanceCriteria: App initializes showing the welcome page view.
Clicking the CTA on the welcome page transitions to the role selection/login view.
Logging in from the role selection page transitions to the correct role-specific dashboard.
Logging out returns the user to the welcome page (or role selection page at minimum).
No existing dashboard or login functionality is broken.

requirements.text: Apply a visually rich, cohesive design theme to the welcome landing page that reflects NIRGRANTHA's identity as an AI-powered EdTech platform for Indian engineering colleges. Use a bold, modern color palette with deep gradients, elegant typography for the brand name, subtle animated or decorative background elements, and a professional yet energetic visual style. Ensure the theme is consistent with the existing portal design tokens defined in the project.

quotes: i want startinG welcome page witH company name NIRGRANTHA

acceptanceCriteria: The welcome page has a distinctive, polished visual theme.
The brand name 'NIRGRANTHA' uses large, prominent typography.
The color scheme feels modern and appropriate for an EdTech platform.
The page is fully responsive and looks good on desktop and mobile.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
Preserve all existing role-based login, role selection, and dashboard functionality.
The company name must be displayed exactly as 'NIRGRANTHA' (all caps).
nonGoals: Adding backend logic or authentication changes.
Redesigning the existing role selection, login, or dashboard pages.
Adding animations beyond subtle decorative background effects on the welcome page.
Changing the role-based routing or dashboard content.

required: Abstract dark-gradient hero background with subtle glowing circuit-board or neural-network line art motif in deep teal and gold tones (nirgrantha-hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
Stylized NIRGRANTHA wordmark logo with a geometric academic cap or connected-node icon in gold and white on a transparent background (nirgrantha-logo.dim_480x120.png)
